subcodes.title: The Rejection of the Manifestations of God in Every Age
subcodes.first_line: When Abraham was sent forth, however much He expounded the truth, established the religion of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که حضرت ابراهیم مبعوث شد و تأسیس شریعت الله نمود و تعالیم جدیده انتشار داد
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @belief and denial, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment
